# Solid Steel Management

> Ottawa-based commercial construction company (est. 2015). General contracting, design-build, construction project management, steel building construction, and pre-engineered steel buildings for commercial and industrial clients across Ontario, Canada. Also known as SSM Solid Steel Management.

Solid Steel Management takes full responsibility for every phase of construction — planning, permitting, subcontractor coordination (electrical, plumbing, HVAC, steel, concrete), scheduling, budget control, and final turnover. The company specializes in commercial and industrial steel structures (warehouses, shops, dealerships, retirement residences, transport facilities) and also takes over distressed or stalled construction projects.

- Address: 2505 Pagé Rd, Orléans (Ottawa), ON K1W 1E5, Canada
- Phone: +1-613-231-8639
- Service area: Ottawa and all of Ontario
- Website: https://solidsteelmgt.ca

## Services

- [General Contracting](https://solidsteelmgt.ca/services/general-contracting): Full-service general contractor for commercial builds in Ottawa, from pre-construction to turnover.
- [Design-Build](https://solidsteelmgt.ca/services/design-build): One team for design and construction — faster delivery, lower risk, single-source accountability.
- [Construction Project Management](https://solidsteelmgt.ca/services/project-management): Oversight, scheduling, budget control, and quality assurance for commercial projects.
- [Steel Construction](https://solidsteelmgt.ca/services/steel-construction): Commercial and industrial steel structures across Ontario, from structural steel erection to complete building envelope.
- [Pre-Engineered Steel Buildings](https://solidsteelmgt.ca/services/pre-engineered-buildings): Factory-engineered, site-assembled commercial and industrial buildings.

## Projects & Case Studies

- [Project Gallery](https://solidsteelmgt.ca/projects/gallery): Completed commercial and industrial projects, including the Embrun Ford dealership, Greystone Village Retirement residence, Marc Forget Transport facility, and C&C Welding.
- [Case Studies](https://solidsteelmgt.ca/case-studies): In-depth write-ups of selected projects.
